sentenceEn: Snow covered the whole mountain.
The cat likes to hide under the bed.
Can you show me the way to the station?
sentenceCh: 你能告訴我去車站的路嗎？

sentenceEn: The museum displays many old paintings.
sentenceCh: 博物館展出許多古老的畫作。

sentenceEn: A rainbow appeared in the sky.
sentenceCh: 天空中出現了一道彩虹。

sentenceEn: The sun disappeared behind the clouds.
He seems to be very tired today.
She looks very happy in this new dress.
sentenceCh: 她穿這件新洋裝看起來很開心。

sentenceEn: That sounds like a great idea.
sentenceCh: 那聽起來是個很棒的主意。

sentenceEn: These roses smell very sweet.
The soup tastes delicious.
I feel cold in this room.
Please do not touch the paintings.
The baseball player hit the ball hard.
The clock will strike twelve soon.
sentenceCh: 時鐘很快就要敲十二點了。

sentenceEn: He kicked the ball into the goal.
Push the door to open it.
Pull the rope as hard as you can.
sentenceCh: 盡你所能用力拉這條繩子。

sentenceEn: Don't throw trash on the ground.
The dog ran to catch the frisbee.
Be careful not to fall down the stairs.
sentenceCh: 小心不要從樓梯上摔下來。

sentenceEn: I slipped on the wet floor.
sentenceCh: 我在濕滑的地板上滑倒了。

sentenceEn: The kids like to slide down the hill.
sentenceCh: 孩子們喜歡從山丘上滑下來。

sentenceEn: The ball rolled under the sofa.
Turn right at the next corner.
The dancer began to spin fast.
He lifted the heavy box easily.
sentenceCh: 他輕鬆地舉起了那個重箱子。

sentenceEn: Raise your hand if you know the answer.
sentenceCh: 如果你知道答案請舉手。

sentenceEn: The sun rises in the east.
Rice grows well in Taiwan.
sentenceCh: 稻米在台灣生長得很好。

sentenceEn: The weather can change very quickly.
sentenceCh: 天氣可能變化得非常快。

sentenceEn: He studied hard to become a doctor.
sentenceCh: 他努力讀書以成為一名醫生。

sentenceEn: What happened to your leg?
The traffic accident occurred yesterday.
sentenceCh: 那場交通事故昨天發生了。

sentenceEn: This red bag belongs to my sister.
sentenceCh: 這個紅色的包包屬於我妹妹。

sentenceEn: It doesn't matter if you make a mistake.
sentenceCh: 犯錯也沒有關係（不要緊）。

sentenceEn: She cares a lot about her friends.
sentenceCh: 她非常在乎她的朋友們。

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: He is a rich and successful businessman.
sentenceCh: 他是一位富有且成功的商人。

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: We should help poor people in the world.
sentenceCh: 我們應該幫助世界上貧窮的人。

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: These shoes are very cheap.

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: That sports car is too expensive for me.
sentenceCh: 那輛跑車對我來說太昂貴了。

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: My dear friend, how are you doing?
sentenceCh: 我親愛的朋友，你最近好嗎？

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: The museum tickets are free for students.
sentenceCh: 博物館的門票對學生是免費的。

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: My father is very busy with his work today.
sentenceCh: 我父親今天工作非常忙碌。

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: Don't be lazy, go do your homework.
sentenceCh: 不要懶惰，去做你的作業。

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: This math test is too hard.
sentenceCh: 這場數學考試太困難了。

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: It is easy to make a sandwich.

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: The rules of the game are very simple.
sentenceCh: 這個遊戲的規則非常簡單。

subLevel: 3B-9 人物狀態與特質形容詞
sentenceEn: The machine has a complex design.
sentenceCh: 這台機器有著複雜的設計。

subLevel: 3B-10 物理現象與感官形容詞
sentenceEn: The water in the river is very clear.

subLevel: 3B-10 物理現象與感官形容詞
sentenceEn: The stars are bright tonight.

subLevel: 3B-10 物理現象與感官形容詞
sentenceEn: It is getting dark outside.

subLevel: 3B-10 物理現象與感官形容詞
sentenceEn: The light in the room is too dim.
sentenceCh: 房間裡的光線太昏暗了。

subLevel: 3B-10 物理現象與感官形容詞
sentenceEn: This empty box is very light.

subLevel: 3B-10 物理現象與感官形容詞
sentenceEn: Can you help me carry this heavy bag?
sentenceCh: 你能幫我拿這個沉重的包包嗎？

subLevel: 3B-10 物理現象與感官形容詞
sentenceEn: The music at the party was too loud.
sentenceCh: 派對上的音樂太大聲了。

subLevel: 3B-10 物理現象與感官形容詞
sentenceEn: Please be quiet in the library.

subLevel: 3B-10 物理現象與感官形容詞
sentenceEn: The room was completely silent.

subLevel: 3B-10 物理現象與感官形容詞
sentenceEn: Stand still while I take your picture.
sentenceCh: 我幫你拍照時請站著別動。

sentenceEn: The bed is very soft and comfortable.
The road is rough and bumpy.
The baby's skin is very smooth.
Be careful with that sharp knife.
This knife is too dull to cut the meat.
sentenceCh: 這把刀太鈍了，切不斷肉。

sentenceEn: He is wearing a thick coat today.
sentenceCh: 他今天穿著一件厚外套。

sentenceEn: The ice on the lake is very thin.
The river is too wide to cross.
sentenceCh: 這條河太寬了，無法過河。

sentenceEn: The path is narrow and steep.
The water in the pool is very deep.
Children should play in the shallow water.
sentenceCh: 孩子們應該在淺水區玩耍。

sentenceEn: The earth is round, not flat.
The ball is round.
The table is square.
Draw a straight line on the paper.
The old man walked with a bent back.
The glass is full of water.
The box is completely empty.
Write your name on the blank page.
sentenceCh: 把你的名字寫在空白頁上。

sentenceEn: Keep your room clean and tidy.
sentenceCh: 保持你的房間乾淨整潔。

sentenceEn: Don't play in the dirty water.
His handwriting is very neat.
Your bedroom is so messy!
This ring is made of pure gold.
I want to buy some fresh fruit.
sentenceCh: 我想要買一些新鮮的水果。

sentenceEn: It is safe to cross the street now.
Swimming in the deep river is dangerous.
He runs very fast.
Let's have a quick meal.
The country has seen rapid growth.
sentenceCh: 這個國家經歷了快速的成長。

sentenceEn: The bus is too slow.
We must get up early tomorrow.
Sorry I am late for class.
Is this story true or false?
sentenceCh: 這個故事是真實的還是虛假的？

sentenceEn: He gave a false name to the police.
Are these diamonds real?
She bought a fake designer bag.
sentenceCh: 她買了一個仿冒的名牌包。

sentenceEn: You are right about that.
sentenceCh: 關於那件事你是正確的。

sentenceEn: I dialed the wrong number.
Please choose the correct answer.
It is not fair to the other players.
All men are created equal.
I heard a strange noise outside.
sentenceCh: 我聽到外面有奇怪的聲音。

sentenceEn: It is an odd thing to say.
He arrived at the usual time.
sentenceCh: 他在尋常的時間到達了。

sentenceEn: It is normal to feel nervous before a test.
sentenceCh: 考前感到緊張是正常的。

sentenceEn: Smith is a common name in the UK.
sentenceCh: 史密斯在英國是個常見的名字。

sentenceEn: It is rare to see snow in this city.
sentenceCh: 在這個城市看到雪是很罕見的。

sentenceEn: This is a special gift for you.
sentenceCh: 這是給妳的一份特別的禮物。

sentenceEn: In general, boys run faster than girls.
sentenceCh: 一般來說，男孩跑得比女孩快。

sentenceEn: He didn't say a single word.
I would like a double cheeseburger.
sentenceCh: 我想要一個雙層起司漢堡。

sentenceEn: He ate the whole pizza by himself.
sentenceCh: 他自己吃掉了整塊披薩。

sentenceEn: Please cut the apple in half.
I am certain that he will come.
Are you sure about your answer?
The plant is dead because of no water.
sentenceCh: 這植物因為缺水而枯死了。

sentenceEn: We were glad to find the lost dog alive.
sentenceCh: 我們很高興找到那隻走失的狗還活著。

sentenceEn: Thank you very much.
This soup is too hot to drink.
The movie was quite interesting.
I would rather stay at home.
The math test was pretty difficult.
sentenceCh: 這次數學考試相當困難。

sentenceEn: We don't have enough time.
He talks too much in class.
sentenceCh: 他在課堂上講太多話了。

sentenceEn: Please give me some more time.
She is the most beautiful girl here.
sentenceCh: 她是這裡最美麗的女孩。

sentenceEn: You should eat less fast food.
This is the least I can do for you.
sentenceCh: 這是我至少能為你做的。

sentenceEn: I am almost ready to go.
sentenceCh: 我幾乎準備好要出發了。

sentenceEn: It took nearly two hours to get there.
sentenceCh: 到那裡幾乎花了兩個小時。

sentenceEn: I can hardly hear what you are saying.
sentenceCh: 我幾乎聽不見你在說什麼。

sentenceEn: Are you really going to quit your job?
Tell me exactly what happened yesterday.
sentenceCh: 確切地告訴我昨天發生了什麼事。

sentenceEn: Suddenly, all the lights went out.
sentenceCh: 突然間，所有的燈都熄滅了。

sentenceEn: He ran away quickly when he saw the dog.
sentenceCh: 他看到狗時快速地跑開了。

sentenceEn: Please speak more slowly.
Read the test instructions carefully.
It was raining heavily yesterday morning.
sentenceCh: 昨天早上下著傾盆大雨（沉重地）。

sentenceEn: Please read the English sentence aloud.
sentenceCh: 請大聲朗讀這個英文句子。

sentenceEn: Maybe we can try again tomorrow.
sentenceCh: 也許我們明天可以再試一次。

sentenceEn: Perhaps he forgot about our meeting.
sentenceCh: 或許他忘了我們的會議。

sentenceEn: I will probably be late for dinner.
He will surely win the game.
sentenceCh: 他肯定會贏得這場比賽。

sentenceEn: I will certainly help you with the project.
sentenceCh: 我當然會幫你做這個專案。

sentenceEn: A friend in need is a friend indeed.
sentenceCh: 患難見真情（的確是朋友）。

sentenceEn: He always gets up early in the morning.
What do you usually do on weekends?
Do you often go to the movies?
Sometimes I walk to work instead of driving.
sentenceCh: 有時候我走路去上班而不是開車。

sentenceEn: He seldom eats breakfast.
She rarely goes out at night.
I have never been to Japan.
Have you ever seen a panda?
The train has already left.
Have you finished your homework yet?
She is still waiting for him at the station.
Where are you going?
I have lived here for ten years.
sentenceCh: 我已經住在這裡十年了。

sentenceEn: Look at that bird over there.
I looked everywhere for my keys.
There is nowhere to hide.
Let's go somewhere quiet to talk.
sentenceCh: 我們去個安靜的某處談談吧。

sentenceEn: I can't find my phone anywhere.
sentenceCh: 我到處都找不到我的手機。

sentenceEn: The bird flew away.
He went out for a walk.
Look up at the beautiful sky.
Please sit down and relax.
The game is over.
The dog is sleeping under the table.
There is a clock above the blackboard.
Please read the sentences below.
The sun went behind the clouds.
Come and sit beside me.
My school is near the train station.
sentenceCh: 我的學校在火車站附近。

sentenceEn: The hospital is far from here.
She sat between her parents.
He is very popular among his friends.
sentenceCh: 他在他的朋友之中很受歡迎。

sentenceEn: The train went through the dark tunnel.
sentenceCh: 火車穿越了黑暗的隧道。

sentenceEn: Be careful when you walk across the street.
sentenceCh: 當你橫越馬路時要小心。

sentenceEn: We walked around the beautiful lake.
sentenceCh: 我們繞著美麗的湖散步。

sentenceEn: This is a book about history.
sentenceCh: 這是一本關於歷史的書。

sentenceEn: Don't lean against the freshly painted wall.
sentenceCh: 不要靠在剛漆好的牆上。

sentenceEn: I can't do it without your help.
sentenceCh: 沒有你的幫忙我做不到。

sentenceEn: You must finish the test within an hour.
sentenceCh: 你必須在一小時內完成考試。

sentenceEn: He jumped into the cold river.
The cat jumped onto the roof.
Please take off your shoes.
Where are you from?
I usually go to school by bus.
I live with my family.
sentenceCh: 我和我的家人住在一起。

sentenceEn: I bought a nice gift for you.
sentenceCh: 我買了一個很棒的禮物給你。

sentenceEn: He works hard as a teacher.
sentenceCh: 他作為一名老師努力工作。

sentenceEn: You are taller than me.
I am tired because I worked all day.
sentenceCh: 我累了，因為我工作了一整天。

sentenceEn: I have lived here since 2010.
If it rains, we will stay at home.
sentenceCh: 如果下雨，我們就會待在家裡。

sentenceEn: You will fail unless you study hard.
sentenceCh: 除非你努力讀書，否則你會不及格。

sentenceEn: Although it was raining, they still went out.
sentenceCh: 雖然下著雨，他們還是出門了。

sentenceEn: Though he is old, he is very strong.
sentenceCh: 雖然他年紀大了，但他非常強壯。

sentenceEn: I want to go, but I don't have time.
sentenceCh: 我想去，但是我沒有時間。

sentenceEn: Do you want tea or coffee?
I like apples and bananas.
It was late, so I went to bed.
sentenceCh: 時間晚了，所以我去睡覺了。

sentenceEn: He can neither read nor write.
Neither of them came to the party.
sentenceCh: 他們兩個人都沒有來派對。

sentenceEn: You can choose either of these two books.
sentenceCh: 你可以選擇這兩本書的任何一本。
